title: Agent 38-24-36
writer: François Billetdoux, Charles Exbrayat, Édouard Molinaro
actors: Brigitte Bardot, Anthony Perkins, Grégoire Aslan
plot: A Russian spy is supposed by the British Secret Service to steal some faked orders, but he is too stupid to succeed. His girlfriend tries to help him, but it seems he is too foolish to succeed.
